tasks.label: release and publish to GitHub
args: Write-Host 'Building release...' -ForegroundColor Yellow; cargo build --release; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { Write-Host 'Build successful! Preparing release...' -ForegroundColor Green; git add .; $version = Read-Host 'Enter version number (e.g., 1.0.0)'; git commit -m "Release v$version"; git tag v$version; Write-Host 'Pushing to https://github.com/ModernDelphiWorks/nest4d-cli...' -ForegroundColor Cyan; git push origin main --tags; Write-Host 'Release v$version published successfully!' -ForegroundColor Green; } else { Write-Host 'Build failed, aborting release' -ForegroundColor Red }

tasks.label: prepare release (build only)
args: Write-Host 'Building release version...' -ForegroundColor Yellow; cargo build --release; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { Write-Host 'Release build successful!' -ForegroundColor Green; Write-Host 'Executable location: target/release/nest4d.exe' -ForegroundColor Cyan; Write-Host 'Ready to commit and push to https://github.com/ModernDelphiWorks/nest4d-cli' -ForegroundColor Yellow; git status; } else { Write-Host 'Build failed!' -ForegroundColor Red }
